meta.configuration_goal: each valid feature configuration maps to a chess-engine variant
meta.taxonomy_note: distinguish configurable features from commonality and from feature-implementation debt

constraints.rationale: Magic indexing is defined over bitboard representation.
Legal move generation extends the base move generation pipeline.
Pseudo-legal generation still depends on core move generation support.
Copy-make still needs deterministic move application.
Unmake is the inverse operation of make-move.
Castling legality depends on attack-aware legal move generation.
En-passant legality depends on legal move validation.
Tree search requires move application.
Minimax implementation uses make/unmake in recursion.
Tree search requires move application.
Alpha-Beta implementation uses make/unmake in recursion.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants include castling rules.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants include en-passant rules.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants detect repetition draws.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants detect 50-move draws.
Tree search requires move application.
Negamax implementation uses make/unmake in recursion.
Quiescence examines tactical continuations via move application.
Quiescence implementation reverts explored captures.
Hash move retrieval requires a transposition table.
Hash move ordering refines the move ordering framework.
Killer heuristic is part of the move ordering framework.
History heuristic is part of the move ordering framework.
Pawn-hash keys are derived from hashing strategy.
Replacement schemes refine how TT entries are stored.
PVS is an Alpha-Beta refinement.
Aspiration windows wrap around Alpha-Beta search bounds.
Null-move pruning is integrated in alpha-beta style search.
LMR depends on alpha-beta move ordering and bounds.
Futility pruning relies on alpha-beta bound context.
Delta pruning is applied in quiescence search.
Passed-pawn scoring is an evaluation term.
Isolated-pawn scoring is an evaluation term.
Doubled-pawn scoring is an evaluation term.
Connected-pawn scoring is an evaluation term.
Bishop-pair scoring is an evaluation term.
Open-file rook bonuses are evaluation terms.
Semi-open-file rook bonuses are evaluation terms.
King-pressure scoring is an evaluation term.
King shelter is an evaluation term.
King activity is an evaluation term.
King activity is modeled as an endgame-weighted evaluation term.
Search core is modeled as a single primary choice.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
